pipeline: NIKTO Drug Discovery Lab v2.0 (RDKit + PyTorch)

targets.name: GP
targets.description: Glycoprotein — primary vaccine and therapeutic target
targets.role: Surface glycoprotein, mediates cell entry via NPC1 receptor
clinical_candidates: Zmapp (cocktail of 3 mAbs: c13C6, c2G4, c4G7)
REGN-EB3 (cocktail of 3 mAbs: atoltivimab, maftivimab, odesivimab)

targets.name: VP35
targets.binding_site: Central basic patch (R305, K309, R312, K319)

targets.name: VP40
targets.role: Membrane association, virus egress, disrupts cell adhesion

vaccine_targets.name: GP
vaccine_targets.description: Glycoprotein — primary vaccine and therapeutic target
vaccine_targets.role: Surface glycoprotein, mediates cell entry via NPC1 receptor
clinical_candidates: Zmapp (cocktail of 3 mAbs: c13C6, c2G4, c4G7)
REGN-EB3 (cocktail of 3 mAbs: atoltivimab, maftivimab, odesivimab)

therapeutic_targets.name: VP35
therapeutic_targets.binding_site: Central basic patch (R305, K309, R312, K319)

therapeutic_targets.name: VP40
therapeutic_targets.role: Membrane association, virus egress, disrupts cell adhesion

failed_drugs.name: ZMapp
failed_drugs.reason: Manufacturing insufficient; outpaced by REGN-EB3, mAb114

failed_drugs.name: Remdesivir
failed_drugs.status: Limited efficacy — reduced mortality in subset only
failed_drugs.reason: Narrow therapeutic window; IV only; renal toxicity

failed_drugs.name: Favipiravir
failed_drugs.reason: Insufficient efficacy at tolerated doses; mutagenic concerns

failed_drugs.name: TKM-Ebola
failed_drugs.status: Failed Phase II — no survival benefit
failed_drugs.reason: Delivery challenges; immune activation; rapid clearance

failed_drugs.name: Galidesivir
failed_drugs.reason: Poor PK; short half-life; liver toxicity

failed_drugs.name: Ervebo (rVSV-ZEBOV)
failed_drugs.reason: -80C cold chain required; single Zaire strain only; not rural-Africa practical

failed_drugs.name: Ad26/MVA (J&J)
failed_drugs.reason: Two-dose regimen; limited field efficacy data

molecule.name: ivermectin_aglycone
molecule.description: Anti-filoviral in vitro EC50=3.5 uM

top_5_candidates.mechanism: Glycoprotein receptor binding inhibition — prevents viral entry into host cells via NPC1
top_5_candidates.text_summary:
Candidate: ivermectin_aglycone
  SMILES: CC(C)C1CC(C2=C(C1)C(=O)C3=C(O2)C=C(C=C3)OC)O
  Targets: GP, VP35, VP40, L_RdRp, VP24
  Best binding: VP40 = 96 nM
  ADMET score: 0.70
  Africa suitability: 0.71
  Overall score: 0.82
  Synthetic accessibility: 0.95
  Mechanism: Glycoprotein receptor binding inhibition — prevents viral entry into host cells via NPC1
